title: actiotypes.js — TOAST string value renamed for namespacing
commit_message: refactor: prefix shared action strings with FEATURE_/ to avoid collisions

why_toast_cascade.explanation: actiotypes.js is shared by every reducer test that lists it in sources[]. Changing the exported string for TOAST breaks any reducer switch that still compares against the old literal. CRITICAL = tests whose symbols[] include TOAST. HIGH = all other feature tests in user-profile and favourites-watchlist that list actiotypes.js — same cascade geometry as scenario 8 (UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN), but scoped to the TOAST symbol.
why_toast_cascade.key_runtime_failure: toastReducer no longer matches incoming actions typed with the old 'TOAST' string unless the reducer imports the updated constant.

tests.test: toastReducer > TOAST action stores the toast message in showToast
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — action type mismatch unless test and reducer use the new string

HIGH.reason: actiotypes.js in sources[] — shared dependency; conservative inclusion for co-located reducer tests

tests.test: userDetailsReducer > initialises with data as an empty array
userDetailsReducer > SUCCESS action populates data and token from the payload
userDetailsReducer > UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN updates token and loginTime independently
userDetailsReducer > ONAUTHENTICATE resets profileAuthSuccess to false
userDetailsReducer > SHOWLOGGEDOUTSHEET stores the payload in showLoggedOutSheet
userDetailsReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action type
profileReducer > initialises with an empty profileData array
profileReducer > PROFILESDETAILS action replaces profileData with the new list
profileReducer > SAVESELECTEDPROFILEDETAILS stores the chosen profile
profileReducer > returns current state unchanged for an unrecognised action
favouritesReducer > starts with an empty userFavourites list
favouritesReducer > UPDATEALLFAVOURITIESDETAILS replaces the favourites list
favouritesReducer > sets favouritesFetched to true once the list is loaded
favouritesReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action
toastReducer > initialises with showToast as null
toastReducer > resets showToast to null when null is dispatched
toastReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action

SKIP.reason: actiotypes.js not in sources[] for standalone or cross-dependent suites under this policy

coverage_gaps.action_required: Update toastReducer.js switch case and any inlined action type strings in tests to match the new exported constant.
